name: Agent-facing retrieval MCP service (search-as-a-service)
objective: Expose knowledge retrieval as an MCP server over HTTP so external AI agents consume search-as-a-service: a search tool (query -> ranked title/snippet/url hits, corpus-scoped) plus optional fetch_document, authed by project (vk_) keys over Streamable-HTTP/SSE, backed by the existing frozen /api/search + embeddings. Realizes deferred D6; first consumer is the hi2vi customer-service chatbot (OpenClaw).
